name: pos-system
description: Professional Point of Sale System - Complete, Secure, and Reliable

scripts.test: node -e "console.log('Testing POS System...'); require('http').get('http://localhost:8080/api/health', (res) => { console.log('✅ POS System is running'); process.exit(0); }).on('error', () => { console.log('❌ POS System not running'); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.health: node -e "require('http').get('http://localhost:8080/api/health', (res) => { console.log('✅ Health check passed'); process.exit(0); }).on('error', () => { console.log('❌ Health check failed'); process.exit(1); });"
scripts.backup: node -e "require('http').request('http://localhost:8080/backup/create', {method: 'POST'}, (res) => { console.log('✅ Backup created'); process.exit(0); }).on('error', () => { console.log('❌ Backup failed'); process.exit(1); }).end();"
scripts.cleanup: node -e "require('http').request('http://localhost:8080/backup/cleanup', {method: 'POST'}, (res) => { console.log('✅ Cleanup completed'); process.exit(0); }).on('error', () => { console.log('❌ Cleanup failed'); process.exit(1); }).end();"

author: Seif Osman
